title: Session state management hook with React integration
purpose: Provides React components with access to session state and actions for managing diagrams, documents, designs, and collaboration state while preventing unnecessary re-renders.
module_context: Exports a useSession hook that integrates with Zustand store for session management and uses shallow comparison for optimized state selection.

steps.content: Access the session store state using shallow comparison to prevent unnecessary re-renders.
Memoize the selected diagram getter to avoid recomputation on every render.
Memoize the selected document getter to avoid recomputation on every render.
Memoize the selected design getter to avoid recomputation on every render.
Return the combined session state and action methods for component consumption.
